requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (RTE INEN + NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（RTE INEN + NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（RTE INEN + NTE INEN / IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Ecuadorian market fall under INEN (Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalizacion) standards and, where covered, a mandatory RTE INEN (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) technical regulation for lighting products. The applicable safety standard is NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), Ecuador's adoption of IEC 60598-1, covering protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation resistance, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminals. Critically, the product must be rated for Ecuador's grid (single-phase 120 V / 220 V, 60 Hz) rather than China's 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz. Demonstrating conformity requires a Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) issued via the INEN-1 route or a recognized conformity-assessment body, presented at customs before market placement through an in-country importer; principal port of entry is Guayaquil.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔市场销售的 LED 灯具受 INEN（厄瓜多尔标准化局，Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalizacion）标准管辖，且在涵盖范围内须符合针对照明产品的强制性 RTE INEN（厄瓜多尔技术法规，Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano）。适用安全标准为 NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），即厄瓜多尔对 IEC 60598-1 的采用，涵盖防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及接线端子。关键在于，产品须按厄瓜多尔电网（单相 120 V / 220 V，60 Hz）额定，而非中国的 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz。证明符合性须取得符合性证书（Certificado de Conformidad），通过 INEN-1 路径或认可的合格评定机构签发，并在上市前由当地进口商在清关时提交；主要入境口岸为瓜亚基尔（Guayaquil）。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多爾市場銷售的 LED 燈具受 INEN（厄瓜多爾標準化局，Servicio Ecuatoriano de Normalizacion）標準管轄，且在涵蓋範圍內須符合針對照明產品的強制性 RTE INEN（厄瓜多爾技術法規，Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano）。適用安全標準為 NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），即厄瓜多爾對 IEC 60598-1 的採用，涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及接線端子。關鍵在於，產品須按厄瓜多爾電網（單相 120 V / 220 V，60 Hz）額定，而非中國的 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz。證明符合性須取得符合性證書（Certificado de Conformidad），通過 INEN-1 路徑或認可的合格評定機構簽發，並在上市前由當地進口商在清關時提交；主要入境口岸為瓜亞基爾（Guayaquil）。

standards_or_laws: RTE INEN technical regulation for lighting products (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano — mandatory where the luminaire is in scope)
NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (Ecuadorian adoption of IEC 60598-1)
Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) — INEN-1 route or recognized conformity-assessment body

summary.en: China's general luminaire safety standard is GB 7000.1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), the national baseline aligned with IEC 60598-1. In-scope luminaires require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA, with testing by CNCA-authorized laboratories. Chinese products are designed for the 220 V 50 Hz single-phase residential grid. Neither GB 7000.1 evidence nor the CCC certificate is recognized for Ecuador's Certificate of Conformity, and the 50 Hz / 220 V design baseline differs from Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 中国通用灯具安全标准为 GB 7000.1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），是与 IEC 60598-1 对齐的国家基准。范围内灯具须取得由 CNCA 管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC），并由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。中国产品按 220 V 50 Hz 单相居民电网设计。GB 7000.1 证据及 CCC 证书均不被厄瓜多尔符合性证书所认可，且 50 Hz / 220 V 设计基准与厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 供电不同。
summary.zht: 中國通用燈具安全標準為 GB 7000.1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），是與 IEC 60598-1 對齊的國家基準。範圍內燈具須取得由 CNCA 管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC），並由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。中國產品按 220 V 50 Hz 單相居民電網設計。GB 7000.1 證據及 CCC 證書均不被厄瓜多爾符合性證書所認可，且 50 Hz / 220 V 設計基準與厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 供電不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 60598-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA / CNCA-C10-01 luminaire rules

gap.en: Both Ecuador (NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1) and China (GB 7000.1) derive from IEC 60598-1, so the core technical requirements are largely aligned. The gaps are procedural and electrical: (1) Ecuador requires a Certificate of Conformity (INEN-1 route or recognized body) presented at customs — the Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted; (2) the product must be rated and tested for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz grid, not China's 220 V 50 Hz — drivers, capacitors, and thermal margins designed for 50 Hz / 220 V must be verified at 60 Hz and at 120 V where applicable; (3) an in-country importer is needed to clear customs (e.g., at Guayaquil) and hold the conformity documentation; (4) marking and instructions should follow Ecuadorian requirements, typically in Spanish. Existing Chinese test reports issued by ILAC-recognized CNAS laboratories may reduce re-testing where the conformity-assessment body accepts them under the IEC base, but acceptance must be confirmed with the chosen body.
gap.zh: 厄瓜多尔（NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1）与中国（GB 7000.1）均源自 IEC 60598-1，核心技术要求基本一致。差距主要在程序与电气方面：（1）厄瓜多尔要求在清关时提交符合性证书（INEN-1 路径或认可机构）——中国 CCC 证书不被接受；（2）产品须按厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 电网额定并检测，而非中国 220 V 50 Hz——按 50 Hz / 220 V 设计的驱动器、电容及热裕度须在 60 Hz 及适用的 120 V 下验证；（3）须由当地进口商办理清关（如在瓜亚基尔）并持有符合性文件；（4）标志与说明应遵循厄瓜多尔要求，通常使用西班牙语。由 ILAC 认可的 CNAS 实验室出具的现有中国检测报告，在合格评定机构基于 IEC 基础予以接受时可减少重新检测，但接受与否须与所选机构确认。
gap.zht: 厄瓜多爾（NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1）與中國（GB 7000.1）均源自 IEC 60598-1，核心技術要求基本一致。差距主要在程序與電氣方面：（1）厄瓜多爾要求在清關時提交符合性證書（INEN-1 路徑或認可機構）——中國 CCC 證書不被接受；（2）產品須按厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 電網額定並檢測，而非中國 220 V 50 Hz——按 50 Hz / 220 V 設計的驅動器、電容及熱裕度須在 60 Hz 及適用的 120 V 下驗證；（3）須由當地進口商辦理清關（如在瓜亞基爾）並持有符合性文件；（4）標誌與說明應遵循厄瓜多爾要求，通常使用西班牙語。由 ILAC 認可的 CNAS 實驗室出具的現有中國檢測報告，在合格評定機構基於 IEC 基礎予以接受時可減少重新檢測，但接受與否須與所選機構確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — luminaires in scope of the applicable RTE INEN lighting technical regulation require a Certificate of Conformity demonstrating NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 electrical safety before customs clearance and market placement in Ecuador
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; GB 7000.1 is the applicable safety standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Ecuador must demonstrate electrical safety under NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 and, where in scope, obtain a Certificate of Conformity under the applicable RTE INEN lighting technical regulation before customs clearance. The technical content is largely harmonized with China's GB 7000.1 (both IEC 60598-1 based), but Chinese CCC certificates are not recognized, and the product must be designed and verified for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz grid rather than China's 220 V 50 Hz. An in-country importer and Spanish-language marking are typically required. Confirm the current RTE INEN regulation number and conformity-assessment route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入厄瓜多尔的 LED 灯具须按 NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 证明电气安全，并在涵盖范围内于清关前依据适用的 RTE INEN 照明技术法规取得符合性证书。技术内容与中国 GB 7000.1（均基于 IEC 60598-1）基本协调，但中国 CCC 证书不被认可，且产品须按厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 电网（而非中国 220 V 50 Hz）设计并验证。通常须有当地进口商及西班牙语标志。出货前请核实现行 RTE INEN 法规编号及合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入厄瓜多爾的 LED 燈具須按 NTE INEN-IEC 60598-1 證明電氣安全，並在涵蓋範圍內於清關前依據適用的 RTE INEN 照明技術法規取得符合性證書。技術內容與中國 GB 7000.1（均基於 IEC 60598-1）基本協調，但中國 CCC 證書不被認可，且產品須按厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 電網（而非中國 220 V 50 Hz）設計並驗證。通常須有當地進口商及西班牙語標誌。出貨前請核實現行 RTE INEN 法規編號及合格評定路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Safety (NTE INEN / IEC 62560 + Control Gear IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（NTE INEN / IEC 62560 + 控制装置 IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（NTE INEN / IEC 62560 + 控制裝置 IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs with integrated driver, voltage above 50 V) for the Ecuadorian market are assessed against NTE INEN-IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications), Ecuador's adoption of IEC 62560, covering insulation, mechanical strength, torque, dielectric strength, and fault conditions. Where a separate LED driver / control gear is involved, NTE INEN / IEC 61347-2-13 (particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules) applies. Conformity is demonstrated through the Certificate of Conformity route, and lamps must be rated for the 120 V / 220 V, 60 Hz Ecuadorian supply. Lamp caps and bases should follow IEC base designations recognized in Ecuador.
summary.zh: 面向厄瓜多尔市场的自镇流 LED 灯（内置驱动的替换型灯泡，电压高于 50 V）按 NTE INEN-IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评估，即厄瓜多尔对 IEC 62560 的采用，涵盖绝缘、机械强度、扭矩、介电强度及故障状态。若涉及独立 LED 驱动器 / 控制装置，则适用 NTE INEN / IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）。符合性通过符合性证书路径证明，灯须按 120 V / 220 V、60 Hz 厄瓜多尔供电额定。灯头与灯座应遵循厄瓜多尔认可的 IEC 灯头标识。
summary.zht: 面向厄瓜多爾市場的自鎮流 LED 燈（內置驅動的替換型燈泡，電壓高於 50 V）按 NTE INEN-IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評估，即厄瓜多爾對 IEC 62560 的採用，涵蓋絕緣、機械強度、扭矩、介電強度及故障狀態。若涉及獨立 LED 驅動器 / 控制裝置，則適用 NTE INEN / IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）。符合性通過符合性證書路徑證明，燈須按 120 V / 220 V、60 Hz 厄瓜多爾供電額定。燈頭與燈座應遵循厄瓜多爾認可的 IEC 燈頭標識。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN-IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Safety specifications (Ecuadorian adoption of IEC 62560)
NTE INEN-IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules
Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) — INEN-1 route or recognized conformity-assessment body

summary.en: China's equivalent for self-ballasted LED lamps is GB 24906 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications), aligned with IEC 62560, and for LED control gear GB 19510.14 (aligned with IEC 61347-2-13). In-scope products require CCC certification administered by CNCA, with CNCA-authorized testing. Chinese lamps are designed for the 220 V 50 Hz supply. Chinese CCC certificates and GB-standard test reports are not recognized for the Ecuadorian Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准：自镇流 LED 灯为 GB 24906（普通照明用、电源电压大于 50 V 的自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐；LED 控制装置为 GB 19510.14（与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐）。范围内产品须取得由 CNCA 管理的 CCC 认证，并由 CNCA 授权机构检测。中国灯按 220 V 50 Hz 供电设计。中国 CCC 证书及 GB 标准检测报告不被厄瓜多尔符合性证书所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準：自鎮流 LED 燈為 GB 24906（普通照明用、電源電壓大於 50 V 的自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊；LED 控制裝置為 GB 19510.14（與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊）。範圍內產品須取得由 CNCA 管理的 CCC 認證，並由 CNCA 授權機構檢測。中國燈按 220 V 50 Hz 供電設計。中國 CCC 證書及 GB 標準檢測報告不被厄瓜多爾符合性證書所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services with supply voltages above 50 V — Safety specifications (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14 — Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13)

gap.en: Ecuador (NTE INEN-IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13) and China (GB 24906 / GB 19510.14) share the same IEC technical base, so most test content overlaps. The gaps are: (1) Ecuador requires a Certificate of Conformity at customs — the Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted; (2) lamps and integrated drivers must be rated and verified for 120/220 V 60 Hz — a lamp built only for 220 V 50 Hz must be confirmed (and may need redesign) for 120 V operation and 60 Hz behaviour, including driver inrush, flicker, and thermal performance; (3) an in-country importer must hold conformity documents and clear customs (commonly Guayaquil); (4) cap/base markings and Spanish-language labelling should follow Ecuadorian requirements. Test reports from ILAC-recognized Chinese (CNAS) laboratories may be reusable where the chosen conformity-assessment body accepts the IEC-based evidence — confirm acceptance before relying on it.
gap.zh: 厄瓜多尔（NTE INEN-IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）与中国（GB 24906 / GB 19510.14）共享相同 IEC 技术基础，多数检测内容重叠。差距在于：（1）厄瓜多尔要求清关时提交符合性证书——中国 CCC 证书不被接受；（2）灯及内置驱动须按 120/220 V 60 Hz 额定并验证——仅按 220 V 50 Hz 制造的灯须就 120 V 运行及 60 Hz 行为（含驱动浪涌、闪烁、热性能）予以确认，并可能需要重新设计；（3）须由当地进口商持有符合性文件并办理清关（通常在瓜亚基尔）；（4）灯头标识及西班牙语标签应遵循厄瓜多尔要求。由 ILAC 认可的中国（CNAS）实验室出具的检测报告，在所选合格评定机构接受该 IEC 基础证据时可重复使用——依赖前请确认接受情况。
gap.zht: 厄瓜多爾（NTE INEN-IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13）與中國（GB 24906 / GB 19510.14）共享相同 IEC 技術基礎，多數檢測內容重疊。差距在於：（1）厄瓜多爾要求清關時提交符合性證書——中國 CCC 證書不被接受；（2）燈及內置驅動須按 120/220 V 60 Hz 額定並驗證——僅按 220 V 50 Hz 製造的燈須就 120 V 運行及 60 Hz 行為（含驅動浪湧、閃爍、熱性能）予以確認，並可能需要重新設計；（3）須由當地進口商持有符合性文件並辦理清關（通常在瓜亞基爾）；（4）燈頭標識及西班牙語標籤應遵循厄瓜多爾要求。由 ILAC 認可的中國（CNAS）實驗室出具的檢測報告，在所選合格評定機構接受該 IEC 基礎證據時可重複使用——依賴前請確認接受情況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamps and LED control gear in scope of the applicable RTE INEN lighting technical regulation require a Certificate of Conformity demonstrating NTE INEN-IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 safety before customs clearance in Ecuador
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope self-ballasted LED lamps and certain LED drivers; GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 are the applicable safety standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps and separate LED control gear entering Ecuador must demonstrate safety under NTE INEN-IEC 62560 and IEC 61347-2-13 and, where in scope, obtain a Certificate of Conformity before customs clearance. The IEC technical base is shared with China's GB 24906 / GB 19510.14, but Chinese CCC certificates are not recognized and the product must be rated and verified for Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz supply rather than 220 V 50 Hz. Confirm cap/base marking, Spanish labelling, and the conformity-assessment route with the in-country importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入厄瓜多尔的自镇流 LED 灯及独立 LED 控制装置须按 NTE INEN-IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13 证明安全，并在涵盖范围内于清关前取得符合性证书。其 IEC 技术基础与中国 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 一致，但中国 CCC 证书不被认可，且产品须按厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 供电（而非 220 V 50 Hz）额定并验证。出货前请与当地进口商确认灯头标识、西班牙语标签及合格评定路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入厄瓜多爾的自鎮流 LED 燈及獨立 LED 控制裝置須按 NTE INEN-IEC 62560 及 IEC 61347-2-13 證明安全，並在涵蓋範圍內於清關前取得符合性證書。其 IEC 技術基礎與中國 GB 24906 / GB 19510.14 一致，但中國 CCC 證書不被認可，且產品須按厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 供電（而非 220 V 50 Hz）額定並驗證。出貨前請與當地進口商確認燈頭標識、西班牙語標籤及合格評定路徑。
